nasb.text: But you, beloved, ought to remember the words that were spoken beforehand by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ,

esv.text: But you must remember, beloved, the predictions of the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.

cnv.text: 但你們呢，親愛的，你們要記住我們主耶穌基督的使徒從前所說的話。

ccb.text: 亲爱的弟兄姊妹，要谨记主耶稣基督的使徒从前给你们的警告。

csbs.text: 至于你们蒙爱的人哪，你们当想起我们主耶稣基督的使徒们先前所说的话。
